features: Ample Quantity Per Roll: With 500 stickers included in each Christmas stickers roll, users advantage from reduced restocking frequency, enabling uninterrupted use in choice projects, crafts, and various decorative applications during festive occasions

Sturdy Festive Decoration Tool: This holiday sticker roll features a laminated finish to retain vibrant colors while offering waterproof and wear-resistant properties, perfect for creating cheerful designs even in winter humidity conditions

Snowman-Inspired Card Embellishments: Featuring a Snow man -themed design and holographic shimmer, these Christmas stickers for cards bring festive styling to life; their appeal makes them perfect for personalizing holiday cards and capturing the spirit of Christmas festivities

Sticking Power: Winter stickers are designed with sticking power, allowing them to adhere seamlessly to paper and glass while offering the advantage of clean removal, making them ideal for creating seasonal crafts or decorating window with ease
Lightweight and Portable: Snow man stickers come in a portable roll format that includes a self-sealing mechanism, ensuring cleanliness and ease of transport for holidays or art activities
description: Product Description Winter Stickers Ample Quantity Per Roll With 500 stickers included in each Christmas stickers roll, users advantage from reduced restocking frequency, enabling uninterrupted use in choice projects, crafts, and various decorative applications during festive occasions Weather-Ready Sticker Solution The holiday sticker roll combines vibrant color retention and a laminated finish to deliver waterproof and wear-resistant stickers, ensuring consistent performance during winter humidity for crafting needs man-Inspired Card Embellishments Featuring a man -themed design and holographic shimmer, these Christmas stickers for cards bring festive styling to life; their appeal makes them perfect for personalizing holiday cards and capturing the spirit of Christmas festivities Snowman Envelope Labels & Seal Stickers bring festive charm to your winter and Christmas projects, with 500 pieces of assorted adhesive designs suitable for kids, adults, and girls alike. These versatile stickers are ideal for greeting card decorations, party decor, stocking stuffers, or adding a touch of creativity to laptops.
